Edit.command: bash -c 'filepath="{file_path}"; if [[ "$filepath" == *"llm_config.yaml"* ]] || [[ "$filepath" == *".github/workflows/"* ]] || [[ "$filepath" == *"screening_rules.yaml"* ]]; then echo "⚠️  Editing critical config: $filepath"; echo "   - llm_config.yaml: LLM task routing and model selection"; echo "   - GitHub workflows: Production automation"; echo "   - screening_rules.yaml: Factor screening logic"; echo ""; echo "Please review changes carefully before applying."; exit 1; fi'
